title: Nine MCP tools registered, exceeding the minimum required capabilities
evidence: McpServer.java:85-165 registers search_matches, head_to_head, team_stats, standings, match_statistics, search_players, player_profile, team_players, top_players_by_nationality
suggestion: None — full coverage of match, team, player, competition, and statistical query categories.

title: Data classes use public mutable fields instead of encapsulation/records
evidence: Player.java:4-23 and Match.java:4-21 expose all state as public fields; no accessors or Java records
suggestion: Use Java records or private fields with accessors for idiomatic immutable data carriers.

title: search_matches sorts on raw datetime, mixing ISO and DD/MM/YYYY-origin rows
evidence: MatchTools.java:40 sorts by raw m.datetime; historical rows are stored as DD/MM/YYYY (DataLoader.java:181) and only normalized to ISO at filter time via normDate (MatchTools.java:381), not for sorting
suggestion: Normalize datetime to ISO at load time (or sort via normDate) so cross-dataset ordering is chronologically correct.

title: Date-range filtering correctly normalizes mixed CSV date formats
evidence: compareDates -> normDate (MatchTools.java:372-389) converts Brazilian DD/MM/YYYY to ISO before comparison, satisfying R4 across datasets
suggestion: None — noted as positive evidence for requirement coverage.
